minimum_for_claim: Enough non-infra failed provider rows across scaffolds to make a stacked failure-label plot meaningful.

minimum_for_claim: Performance summaries include numerator, denominator, and Wilson interval fields.

limitation: Intervals are not a substitute for adequate coverage or independent timing.
next_action: Keep Wilson intervals in future performance summaries and report raw n.
